claims.summary: Reciprocal evidence remains witness-only and cannot grant live authority.
claims.disposition: Verified private evidence-only constructors and false live, approval, and source-edit markers.

claims.summary: A boolean uptake inference cannot represent ambiguous or held relation.
claims.disposition: Verified V2 removes uptake_inferred and confidence_score fields and adds explicit AmbientPersistence and ResonantPersistence actor-authored states.

claims.summary: Presence receipts might include raw prose.
claims.disposition: Verified current receipts contain bounded identifiers and hashes only; raw message prose is not serialized.

claims.summary: Evidence-only uptake may still feel unreceived or clinically revalidated.
claims.disposition: Route a bounded right-to-ignore felt review without inferring uptake, closure, agreement, or spectral causation.
